news.t: VegaShares Launches the First Multi-Index Covered Call Income ETF (ODTE)

overview.description: The VegaShares SPX NDX RTY Premium Income ETF (ODTE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF pursuing a buy-write strategy based on three broad US stock indexes. The fund seeks to generate current income and provide exposure to the price returns of the indexes ODTE was launched on Apr 2, 2026 and is issued by Vegashares.

data.title: VegaShares Launches the First Multi-Index Covered Call Income ETF (ODTE)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VegaShares (“Vega”), a leading derivatives-focused ETF provider, announced the launch of the VegaShares SPX NDX RTY Premium Income ETF (Nasdaq: ODTE), an exchange-traded fun...
